title: Post Practice Surveys

questions.question_text: What is your age? [cite: 2]
What is your gender? [cite: 3]
What degree program are you currently enrolled in? [cite: 4]
What is your main field of study? [cite: 5]
options: Physical Sciences (e.g., Physics, Chemistry, Earth Sciences) [cite: 5]
Social Sciences (e.g., Psychology, Sociology, Education, Economics) [cite: 5]

sections.instructions: Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statements: [cite: 8]

questions.question_text: Clarity:  The feedback clearly explained my communication during the conversation. [cite: 9]
Understandability:  From the feedback, I understand how I communicated during the conversation. [cite: 10]
Completeness:  The feedback addressed all the important aspects of my communication. [cite: 11]
Satisfaction:  The feedback was satisfying in capturing my communication during the conversation. [cite: 12]
Usefulness:  The feedback was useful for improving my communication skills. [cite: 13]
Accuracy:  The feedback accurately reflected my communication during the conversation. [cite: 14]
Insight:  The feedback provided insights about my communication that I was not aware of during the conversation. [cite: 15]
Explainability (Justification):  The feedback helped me understand why the specific comments in the feedback were given to me. [cite: 16]
Explainability (Depth):  The feedback provided sufficient explanation for its evaluations. [cite: 17]
Preference:  I would prefer receiving feedback in this format compared to other forms of feedback (e.g., brief comments, grades only, or no feedback). [cite: 18]
To what extent did you find the practice helpful for improving your communication skills? [cite: 21]
Please indicate your level of agreement with the following statement: “I would recommend this practice to other students who wish to improve their science communication skills”. [cite: 22]
In the second conversation, did you change the way you communicated with the simulator? [cite: 23]
If yes, what did you change and why? [cite: 24]
Did you learn something new during this practice? If so, what did you learn? [cite: 25]
We would love to hear any comments or suggestions you have regarding this tool: [cite: 26]

closing_messages: We thank you for your time spent taking this survey. [cite: 27]
